ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "stable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the stock is stable (Yes/No) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_yields" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend yield record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the dividend yield */,
  "yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "payout_ratio" REAL /* Payout ratio as a percentage */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the dividend yield data */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is no longer paid to new buyers of the stock */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_yields_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drop_counts" (
  "drop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drop count record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the drop count */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for the drop count (e.g., L10Y) */,
  "drop_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the stock has dropped in the specified period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "average_drop_percentage" REAL /* Average percentage drop during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drop_counts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
